name: Mediterranean Vegetable Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all dough ingredients except the cornmeal, in order as suggested by your bread machine manual, and process on the dough cycle according to manufacturer's directions.
2. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit while the dough is being processed.
3. Place onions (in skins), zucchini, tomato, and garlic cloves (in skins) on a nonstick baking sheet.
4. Bake tomatoes and garlic for 20 minutes; bake onions and zucchini for 40 minutes. Let vegetables cool.
5. Peel onions and garlic, then chop the vegetables coarsely.
6. Remove the dough from the machine when the cycle is finished and divide it into two halves.
7. On a floured board with a floured rolling pin, roll each half of dough into a 10-inch round.
8. Sprinkle cornmeal on two nonstick baking sheets or pizza pans.
9. Place the rolled dough rounds onto the prepared pans, prick all over with a fork, and bake for 15 minutes.
10. Top pizzas with chopped vegetables and continue baking for an additional 5 minutes.
11. Remove pizzas from oven and sprinkle with basil, oregano, and thyme.
12. Serve hot or at room temperature. If cheese is desired, add it under the vegetables so it melts and stays soft.
